approval_rule: External issues, pull requests, marketplace listings, and registry submissions require explicit approval before execution.

local_validation: validate server.json, glama.json, and Smithery MCPB metadata
build Smithery MCPB from a release binary
run stdio MCP transcript smoke
record directory URL, version/date, and install metadata
decide Zotero adapter package, XPI, or both
run disposable Zotero library preview/apply/audit smoke
run EndNote ENW/RIS reparse and import proof
publish release notes that separate adapter/file handoff from listing claims
build OJS package
record OJS compatibility matrix
run fixture smoke and optional disposable OJS instance smoke
prepare Gallery submission draft with rollback/support notes
blockers: live or disposable instance compatibility proof missing
PKP Plugin Gallery PR or accepted listing evidence missing

local_validation: complete Track 78 requirements matrix
complete Track 79 current-platform fixtures and no-writeback proof
complete Track 80 legacy event/domain fixtures and no-writeback proof
complete Track 81 readiness review
record no-package decision or package scaffold per host
run MCP transcript smoke
run Gemini/Qwen install smoke when package exists
record Copilot entitlement/settings proof before enabled claims
create thin VSIX scaffold
prove Workspace Trust behavior
run diagnostics fixture coverage
run package build and install/uninstall smoke
only add host-specific skills after stable package workflow contracts
only add CI workflows for deterministic checks with small path triggers
keep submission mutations approval-gated
